phrases.intent_en: Ask where the beach station is located
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a estação da praia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH shtuh-SOWN DUH PREYEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: The lower station connects directly to the promenade and beach access.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Estação da Praia.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shtuh-SOWN DUH PREYEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the beach station.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the beach station.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shtuh-SOWN DUH PREYEUH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Estação da Praia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach the Suberco viewpoint
phrases.text_local: Como chego ao Miradouro do Suberco?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo OW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO soo-BEH-ruh-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: The viewpoint offers panoramic views. Pedestrian access only.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Suberco.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO soo-BEH-ruh-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Miradouro do Suberco.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Miradouro do Suberco.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO soo-BEH-ruh-koo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Suberco.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Praia station is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, onde fica a Estação da Praia?
phrases.pronunciation: skoo-ZEE, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH shtuh-SOWN DUH PREYEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: The lower station is directly on Nazaré's main beachfront promenade.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a Estação da Praia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH shtuh-SOWN DUH PREYEUH?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Estação da Praia.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shtuh-SOWN DUH PREYEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Praia station.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Praia station.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shtuh-SOWN DUH PREYEUH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Estação da Praia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the beach station is located
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Estação da Praia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH shtuh-SOWN DUH PREYEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: A Estação da Praia é a estação inferior do funicular, localizada junto ao porto de pesca.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Estação da Praia.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shtuh-SOWN DUH PREYEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Beach Station.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Beach Station.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shtuh-SOWN DUH PREYEUH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Estação da Praia.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a estação do funicular mais próxima?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH shtuh-SOWN DOO foo-nee-koo-LAHR MEYESH PRAW-see-muh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Estação da Praia ou Estação do Sítio.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shtuh-SOWN DUH PREYEUH OHW shtuh-SOWN DOO SEET-yoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Praia Station or Sítio Station.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Praia Station or Sítio Station.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shtuh-SOWN DUH PREYEUH OHW shtuh-SOWN DOO SEET-yoo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Estação da Praia ou Estação do Sítio.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach the Suberco viewpoint
phrases.text_local: Como chegar ao Miradouro do Suberco?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo shih-GAHR OW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO soo-BEH-ruh-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: O Miradouro do Suberco oferece vistas panorâmicas e fica próximo da Fortaleza de São Miguel Arcanjo.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Suberco após sair da cabina.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO soo-BEH-ruh-koo uh-PAWSH SUHEER DUH kuh-BEE-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Suberco viewpoint after leaving the cabin.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Suberco viewpoint after leaving the cabin.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO soo-BEH-ruh-koo uh-PAWSH SUHEER DUH kuh-BEE-nuh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Suberco após sair da cabina.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Sítio station is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a estação do Sítio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH shtuh-SOWN DOO SEET-yoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Locals refer to the upper station as Sítio. Access involves steep slopes.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Fortaleza.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH foo-ruh-tuh-LEH-zuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the fort.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the fort.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH foo-ruh-tuh-LEH-zuh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Fortaleza.
